data.content: Shipment complete. All 7 child knots reviewed and shipped. Knots core: acceptance column in schema (e071), --acceptance CLI flag (09f2), KnotAcceptanceSet event kind (2bc3), prompt rendering (93c9), test coverage at 95.23% (28b1). Foolery: knots.ts serialization (2aa3), knots-backend native field with legacy fallback (ed42, fix 55706664). Knots main merge 3fc70a7b0542, foolery main merge 3afbd2f70345, CI green on both repos.
